wikitext:
{{Card Infobox|Soul||2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Exhaust|2}}{{C|Soul||2}} is a 0 {{Icon|NE|2}} cost {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless|Colorless|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Token|Token|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Skill|2}} Card available to the {{KW|Necrobinder||2}}. It draws 2 cards then {{KW|Exhaust|Exhausts|2}} itself. The {{KW|Necrobinder||2}} has a lot of dedicated support for {{C|Soul|Souls|2}}.
== Sources ==
{{C|Soul|Souls|2}} cannot be added to a player's Deck by any means. The following sources will generate {{C|Soul|Souls|2}} when played or activated:
===Cards===
* {{C|Grave Warden||2}}: Add a {{C|Soul|Soul(+)|2}} into your Draw Pile.
* {{C|Reave||2}}: Add a {{C|Soul|Soul(+)|2}} into your Draw Pile.
* {{C|Dirge||2}}: Add X {{C|Soul|Souls(+)|2}} into your Draw Pile.
* {{C|Capture Spirit||2}}: Add 3(4) {{C|Soul|Souls|2}} into your Draw Pile.
* {{C|Severance||2}}: Add a {{C|Soul||2}} into your Draw Pile, Hand, and Discard Pile.
* {{C|Glimpse Beyond||2}}: All players add 3(4) {{C|Soul|Souls|2}} into their Draw Pile.
* {{C|Reave||2}}: Transform a card in your Draw Pile into {{C|Soul|Soul(+)|2}}.
===Relics===
* {{R|Funerary Mask||2}}: 3 {{C|Soul|Souls|2}} at the start of combat.
===Potions===
* {{P|Pot of Ghouls||2}}: 2 {{C|Soul||2}}.

== Interactions ==
* {{C|Haunt||2}}: Whenever you play a {{C|Soul||2}}, a random enemy loses 6(8) HP.
* {{C|Devour Life||2}}: Whenever you play a {{C|Soul||2}}, {{KW|Summon||2}} 1(2).
* {{C|Soul Storm||2}}: Deals 2(3) additional damage for each {{C|Soul||2}} in your Exhaust Pile.

=== Synergies === 
* As {{C|Soul|Souls|2}} are 0-{{Icon|NE|2}} cost {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Skills|Skills|2}} cards that draw cards (possibly including other {{C|Soul|Souls|2}}), they synergize with:
** {{C|Death March||2}}, which increases in power for each card drawn.
** Buffs/Debuffs activated when a card is played, including {{BD|Oblivion||2}} and another player's {{BD|Sneaky||2}}.
** {{2|Relics}} that trigger when Skills are played, including {{R|Letter Opener||2}} and {{R|Tuning Fork||2}}.
* Anything that benefits from {{KW|Exhaust}} will be triggered by playing {{C|Soul|Souls|2}}.

=== Neutral ===

=== Anti-Synergy ===
* As {{C|Soul|Souls|2}} are often played frequently, they have an anti-synergy with:
** Effects that limit card plays, including {{R|Velvet Choker||2}} and {{BD|Ringing||2}}.
** Effects that produce negative effects for played cards, such as {{BD|Tender||2}}.

== Update History ==
*'''Early Access v0.98'''
**Added Soul to the game.
